free_text: Custom typed spreadsheet layout (footer: 'MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16'): assets are COLUMNS, attributes are rows. Attribute rows: EIF (blank for all columns); SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Value of Asset (buckets A: None through L: Over $50,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000); Type of Income (None, Dividends, Rent, Interest, Capital Gains, Excepted/Blind Trust, Tax-Deferred, Other Type of Income); Amount of Income: Current Year (A: None ... K: Over $5,000,000, Spouse/DC Income over $1,000,000); Amount of Income: Preceding Year January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016 (same buckets). Filled (blacked-out) cells mark the selection. This layout has no Block E transaction column, so transaction is null for all rows. Both amount-of-income blocks are recorded as amount_of_income_current_year and amount_of_income_preceding_year. Page header: 'Name: Rohit Khanna', 'Page ___ of ___' (blank).

uncertainties.note: printed with spaces between letters; tesseract reads 'IHS'
